notes: Pilot low/longest bar; bounds K-constant + cut-long discipline.
Pilot high/shortest bar; validates short-bar dimensional sensitivity (~1% cent shift per ~0.025 in).
Art-fair pentatonic; share aluminum stock with chromatic.
Cut-long aluminum blank; mass-and-strike test on foam supports before drilling node holes.
After trim-to-length and deburr; supports at node positions; record measured Hz.
Cord through node holes with rubber grommets; supported on 1/8" stainless rod.
Final walnut frame; check buzz at soft/medium/loud strikes; record sustain after first 6 dB drop.
